decision-tree.root-question: Does the manager own ≥3 reports, run a documented 1:1 cadence, and have a private notes space?

branch.when: direct_reports >= 3 AND cadence_set == true AND notes_space_present == true
branch.conclusion: Adopt the template: agenda + carry-forward + growth + actions + next-review per session.
Block. Pick a notes space first; un-documented 1:1s decay.
Skip. Single-page memo is cheaper at this size.
